title: blechnum confusum
intro: Blechnum confusum, also known as the New Zealand chain fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. This plant is said to have various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Blechnum confusum include its potential to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Blechnum confusum is traditionally used in herbal preparations, often in the form of a tea or tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
